Employees can submit their grievances to the human resources department. 員工可以向人力資源部門提交他們的不滿。
She felt she had a legitimate grievance about the way she was treated. 她覺得自己對受到的對待有正當的怨言。
The family gathered to grieve for their beloved grandfather who had passed away. 全家人聚集在一起，哀悼（悲傷）他們去世的祖父。
It takes time to grieve the loss of a loved one and find peace again. 哀悼失去所愛的人並重新找到平靜需要時間。

meaning: 一種具有獅子身體、鷹翼和頭的神獸。
sentences: The term griffin refers to a mythical beast having the body of a lion and the wings and head of an eagle. 獅鷲這個字指的是一種神話中的野獸，有獅子的身體和鷹的翅膀和頭。
The lesson introduced griffin as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了「格里芬」這個術語，這是一個需要理解的有用術語。
We decided to grill some steaks and vegetables in the backyard for dinner. 我們決定在後院烤一些牛排和蔬菜當晚餐。
The police spent hours grilling the suspect about his whereabouts. 警方花了幾個小時盤問嫌疑人的去向。

meaning: 就像在烤架上煮熟一樣。
sentences: After a day in the sun, he looked more grilled than his hamburger. 在陽光下曬了一天后，他看起來比他的漢堡還要烤。
The report describes the result as grilled. 報告將結果描述為「烤焦」。
The economic outlook for the next year remains grim and uncertain. 明年的經濟前景依然嚴峻且充滿不確定性。
The soldiers' faces were grim as they prepared for the difficult battle. 士兵們準備迎接艱難戰鬥時，臉上表情沈重（嚴峻）。
He let out a grimace of pain after hitting his thumb. 大拇指被砸到後，他露出痛苦的表情。
The child made a funny grimace at his mother. 孩子對母親扮了個滑稽的鬼臉。

meaning: 根深蒂固且難以清除的污垢、油脂、煙灰等。
sentences: Underneath all that soot, dirt and grime is the true beauty of the church in soft shades of sandstone. 在所有煙灰、污垢和污垢之下，是教堂在柔和的砂岩色調下的真正美麗。
The term grime refers to dirt, grease, soot, etc. that is ingrained and difficult to remove. 污垢一詞是指根深蒂固且難以清除的污垢、油脂、煙灰等。
He had a wide grin on his face when he heard the good news. 聽到好消息時，他臉上帶著燦爛的咧嘴笑。
She grinned at me and waved her hand from across the street. 她對我咧嘴一笑，並從街道對面揮了揮手。
She used a traditional stone mortar to grind the fresh spices. 她用傳統的石臼來研磨新鮮香料。
The machine manages to grind the hard coffee beans into powder. 這台機器竟然（能）將堅硬的咖啡豆磨成（研磨）粉末。

meaning: 無情地徵稅；繁重的；嚴格到精疲力盡的地步。
sentences: A week of filled with grinding toil. 一週的時間充滿了艱辛的勞動。
The report describes the result as grinding. 報告將結果描述為研磨。

meaning: grin 的現在分詞與動名詞
sentences: I’m grinning because someone told me a joke. 我笑了，因為有人跟我講了個笑話。
People often grinning when the situation calls for it. 當情況需要時，人們常常會微笑。
She had a firm grip on the handle of the heavy suitcase. 她緊緊握住沈重手提箱的把手。
The city was in the grip of a severe winter storm for several days. 這座城市連續幾天都籠罩在嚴重的冬季風暴之中（受掌控）。

meaning: 所掌握的；一個把手；握力。
sentences: the gripe of a sword 劍的握力
The term gripe refers to That which is grasped; a handle; a grip. 抱怨這個字指的是被抓住的東西；一個把手；握力。
The sand was full of tiny pieces of grit. 沙子裡充滿了細小的沙礫。
It takes a lot of grit and determination to succeed in this industry. 要在這個產業成功需要很大的勇氣與決心。
That goth woman is very gritty. 那個哥德女人非常堅韌。
Something described as gritty is spirited; resolute; unyielding. 被描述為堅韌的東西是充滿活力的；堅決;不屈。

meaning: 脾氣暴躁或煩躁地哭泣或抱怨。
sentences: a grizzly baby 灰熊寶寶
Something described as grizzly is crying or whingeing in a bad-tempered or irritable way. 被描述為灰熊的東西是指以脾氣暴躁或易怒的方式哭泣或抱怨。
The patient began to groan in pain as the medication began to wear off. 隨著藥效開始消退，病人開始因痛苦而呻吟。
He's always groaning about how much work he has to do every single day. 他總是抱怨（呻吟）自己每天有做不完的工作。

meaning: 負載沉重，彷彿在壓力下嘎吱作響。
sentences: We sat down to a groaning table and feasted all evening. 我們坐在一張嘎吱作響的桌子旁，吃了一整晚的大餐。
The report describes the result as groaning. 報告將結果描述為“呻吟”。
To grocer means to sell groceries; to act as a grocer. Togrocer 指的是出售雜貨；充當雜貨商。
People may grocer in different situations depending on the context. 人們可能會根據具體情況在不同的情況下去雜貨店。
I need to go to the grocery store to buy some milk and eggs. 我需要去雜貨店買點牛奶和雞蛋。
We usually do our grocery shopping on Saturday morning. 我們通常在週六早上買雜貨。
The athlete suffered a strain in his groin during practice. 這位運動員在練習時拉傷了腹股溝。
The doctor examined the patient's groin area for any abnormalities. 醫生檢查了病人的腹股溝區域是否有任何異常。

meaning: 表演、跳舞或享受有節奏的音樂。
sentences: I was just starting to groove to the band when we had to leave. 當我們不得不離開時，我正開始跟著樂團一起律動。
To groove means to perform, dance to, or enjoy rhythmic music. 律動意味著表演、跳舞或享受有節奏的音樂。

meaning: 屬於、關於或具有凹槽的。
sentences: The back of the tile was groovy so that it could hold the adhesive compound. 磁磚的背面有凹槽，可以容納黏合劑。
Something described as groovy is of, pertaining to, or having grooves. 被描述為「groovy」的東西是屬於、屬於或具有凹槽的。
The company's gross income has increased significantly over the past year. 公司的總收入在過去一年中顯著增加。
That's gross! Please don't pick your nose in front of everyone. 太噁心了！請不要在大家面前挖鼻子。

meaning: 大大;在很大程度上，尤其是大到足以坦率地評價的程度。
sentences: grossly inflated expectations 嚴重誇大的期望
grossly enlarged hepatic lobes, evident on palpation 肝葉明顯增大，觸診明顯

meaning: 形狀或大小扭曲且不自然；異常的，尤其是以一種可怕的方式。
sentences: Something described as grotesque is distorted and unnatural in shape or size; abnormal, especially in a hideous way. 被描述為怪誕的事物是指形狀或大小扭曲且不自然的事物；不正常，尤其是以一種可怕的方式。
The word grotesque is often used to describe a person, thing, or situation. 怪誕這個詞常用來形容人、事或情況。
The ground was covered with colorful fallen leaves in autumn. 地面覆蓋著繽紛的落葉。
Be careful not to sit on the cold and damp ground. 小心別坐在寒冷潮濕的地上。

meaning: 液體底部的沉積物，或液體已從中過濾出來的沉積物。
sentences: The term grounds refers to The sediment at the bottom of a liquid, or from which a liquid has been filtered. 術語「渣」是指液體底部的沉積物，或液體已從中過濾出來的沉積物。
We learned the meaning of grounds during today's lesson. 我們在今天的課程中學習了理由的含義。

meaning: 基金會 ；支持或允許其餘部分的 基本 或<a rel="mw:WikiLink" href="/tiftlement" 基本部分。
sentences: The discovery of the laws of electricity laid the groundwork for a century of innovation. 電定律的發現為一個世紀的創新奠定了 基礎 。 電定律的發現為一個世紀的創新奠定了基礎。 電動力學的發現為一個世紀的創新奠定了基礎。

The term groundwork refers to The foundation; the basic or fundamental parts that support or allow for the rest. 「基礎」一詞指的是 基金會 ；支持或允許其餘部分的 基本 或<a rel="m=") 基本部分。 「基礎」一詞是指基礎；支持或允許其餘部分的基本或基本部分。 「基礎」指的是基金會；支持或允許其餘部分的基本部分或<a rel="m=") 基本部分。
A group of students was discussing the project in the library. 一群學生正在圖書館討論專案。
The company is divided into several different work groups. 公司被分成幾個不同的工作小組。
The term grouse refers to a cause for complaint; a grumble. 松雞一詞指的是抱怨的原因；一聲抱怨。
The lesson introduced grouse as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了松雞作為一個易於理解的有用術語。
I spent the whole afternoon grouting the kitchen floor. 我花了整個下午給廚房地板灌漿。
People often grout when the situation calls for it. 當情況需要時，人們常常會發牢騷。

meaning: 在樹林中耕種；自然生長，形成樹林。
sentences: To grove means to cultivate in groves; to grow naturally so as to form groves. To grove的意思是在樹林裡耕種；自然生長，形成樹林。
People may grove in different situations depending on the context. 根據環境的不同，人們可能會陷入不同的情況。
He had to grovel to his boss to keep his job. 他不得不對老闆卑躬屈膝以保住工作。
The beggar was groveling on the ground, asking for money. 乞丐蜷伏在地上乞討錢財。
Rice and vegetables grow well in this fertile soil. 水稻和蔬菜在這種肥沃的土壤中生長良好。
Children grow up so fast these days! 現在的孩子長大得真快！
He was an orange grower from Florida. 他是來自佛羅裡達州的一名橙子種植者。
The term grower refers to a farmer; one who grows things. 種植者一詞指的是農民；種植東西的人。
The growing season here begins in March. 這裡的生長季節從三月開始。
The term growing refers to The raising of plants. 術語“種植”是指植物的培育。
The large dog began to growl at the stranger who was approaching the gate. 大狗對著靠近大門的陌生人低吼（咆哮）。
I could hear his stomach growl, as he hadn't eaten anything all day. 我能聽到他肚子咕咕叫（低吼），因為他一整天都沒吃東西。

meaning: 持續發出咆哮聲或喉音。
sentences: The growling from her stomach told us she was hungry. 她的肚子咕嚕咕嚕叫，告訴我們她餓了。
The term growling refers to A sustained instance of growls or guttural noises. 咆哮一詞是指持續的咆哮或喉音。
What once was a farm was grown with trees. 曾經的農場現在種滿了樹木。
Something described as grown is covered by growth; overgrown. 被描述為「成長」的東西被「成長」所覆蓋；雜草叢生。
Regular exercise is essential for the healthy growth of children. 定期運動對於兒童的健康成長至關重要。
The company has experienced rapid growth in the international market. 公司在國際市場經歷了快速增長。

meaning: 挖掘；連根拔起；藉由挖掘來連根拔起；經常跟隨 up。
sentences: to grub up trees, rushes, or sedge 拔除樹木、燈芯草或莎草
To grub means to dig; to dig up by the roots; to root out by digging; often followed by up. grub 的意思是挖掘；連根拔起；透過挖掘來連根拔起；經常跟著up。
He's a grubby little boy, always playing around by the stream. 他是個 骯髒 的小男孩，總是在溪邊玩耍。 他是個髒兮兮的小男孩，總是在小溪邊玩耍。 他是個骯髒的小男孩，總是在溪邊。
The report describes the result as grubby. The report describes the result as grubby. 報告將結果描述為骯髒不堪。報告將結果描述為骯髒不堪。

meaning: 對某事或某人的根深蒂固和/或長期的敵意或惡意，尤其是由於感知到的虐待。
sentences: to have, hold, owe or bear a grudge against someone 對某人有、持有、欠某人或懷有怨恨
The term grudge refers to deep-seated and/or long-term animosity or ill will about something or someone, especially due to perceived mistreatment. 怨恨一詞指的是對某事或某人的根深蒂固和/或長期的敵意或惡意，尤其是由於感知到的虐待而產生的。
The team was so unprepared that the way it played was just gruesome. 球隊毫無準備，比賽的方式非常可怕。
Something described as gruesome is awful, terrible. 形容為可怕的東西是可怕的、可怕的。
Stop grumbling about the weather and try to enjoy your summer holiday. 別再為天氣發牢騷（抱怨）了，試著享受你的暑假吧。
We could hear the distant grumble of thunder as the storm approached. 我們能聽到暴風雪臨近時遠處隆隆的雷聲。
He is always grumpy in the morning before he has his coffee. 他在早晨喝咖啡前總是很暴躁。
The grumpy old man shouted at the children playing in front of his house. 那個脾氣暴躁的老人對著在他家門前玩耍的孩子大喊大叫。
Who just grunted? 剛才是誰咕噥了一聲？
To grunt means to break wind; to fart. 咕嚕聲意味著放屁；放屁。
The company provides a one-year guarantee for its new products. 公司為其新產品提供一年保證（保固）。
I can guarantee that everything will be fine in the end, really. 我可以保證最後一切都會好起來的，真的。
The security guard checked my identification at the entrance. 保全人員在入口處檢查了我的身分證。
You should always be on your guard against online scams. 你應該時刻警惕，防範網路詐騙。
His elder brother was appointed as his legal guardian lately. 他的哥哥最近被任命為他的法定監護人。
The organization aims to act as a guardian of the environment. 該組織旨在擔任環境的守護者（監護人）。

meaning: 擔任監護人或保管人（尤其是具有法律身分）的職務或職位。
sentences: The term guardianship refers to The office or position of one acting as a guardian or conservator, especially in a legal capacity. 監護權一詞是指擔任監護人或保管人的職務或職位，尤其是具有法律身分的人。
We learned the meaning of guardianship during today's lesson. 在今天的課程中我們學習了監護的意義。
Guava is a tropical fruit that is rich in Vitamin C and fiber. 番石榴是一種富含維生素 C 和纖維的熱帶水果。
Taiwanese guavas are very sweet and crunchy, and everyone loves them. 台灣的番石榴又甜又脆，每個人都喜歡吃。

meaning: 海員針織羊毛衫，類似運動衫。
sentences: The term guernsey refers to a seaman's knitted woolen sweater, similar to a jersey. 根西島一詞指的是海員針織羊毛衫，類似運動衫。
The lesson introduced guernsey as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了根西島作為一個易於理解的有用術語。

meaning: 獨立小團體中的士兵，透過突襲與政府或正規軍作戰。
sentences: The right-wing paramilitary's offensive against the Marxist guerrillas failed because they did not know the terrain well enough. 右翼準軍事部隊對馬克思主義遊擊隊的攻擊失敗，是因為他們對地形不夠了解。
The term guerrilla refers to a soldier in a small independent group, fighting against the government or regular forces by surprise raids. 遊擊隊一詞指的是一個小型獨立團體中的士兵，透過突襲與政府或正規部隊作戰。
Can you guess how old she is? 她看起來非常年輕。 你能猜出她幾歲嗎？
I guess that we will reach our destination in about an hour. 我猜我們大約在一小時後會到達目的地。
We are expecting some guests for dinner tomorrow evening. 我們預計明晚會有一些客人來家裡吃晚餐。
The hotel provides various amenities to ensure its guests' comfort. 飯店提供各種設施以確保客人的舒適。
The counselor provided professional guidance to the students. 顧問為學生提供了專業的指導。
We need more guidance from the manager on how to finish the task. 我們需要經理就如何完成任務提供更多指導。
The experienced guide led us through the dense mountain forest. 經驗豐富的導遊帶領我們穿過茂密的森林。
This handbook is a useful guide for new employees at the company. 這本手冊是公司新員工的實用指南。
The government issued new guidelines for healthy eating and physical exercise. 政府發布了新的健康飲食和體育鍛煉指導方針。
Please make sure you follow the guidelines provided in the instruction manual. 請確保您遵循說明書中提供的準則。

meaning: 一群具有共同特徵或習慣的不同物種。
sentences: The term guild refers to a group of diverse species that share common characteristics or habits. 行會一詞是指具有共同特徵或習慣的不同物種的群體。
The lesson introduced guild as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了「行會」這個術語，這是一個需要理解的有用術語。
The detective used a bit of guile to catch the suspect. 探員用了一點計謀抓住了嫌犯。
He is a man of great intelligence and guile. 他是一個非常聰明且有心機的人。

meaning: 使用斷頭台（對某人或某事）。用斷頭台處決（某人）。
sentences: Many counterrevolutionaries were guillotined during the French Revolution. 法國大革命期間，許多反革命分子被送上斷頭台。
People often guillotine when the situation calls for it. 當情況需要時，人們常常會被送上斷頭台。
He felt a sense of deep guilt for his dishonest behavior earlier. 他對自己早先不誠實的行為感到深深的內疚（有罪感）。
The prisoner managing to admit his guilt in the court today. 囚犯今天在法庭上竟然（設法）承認了自己的罪行（有罪）。
The jury found the defendant guilty of all the serious charges. 陪審團判定被告所有嚴重指控罪名成立（有罪的）。
She felt very guilty about forgetting her best friend's birthday. 她對忘記好友的生日感到非常內疚（有罪的）。
The antique vase was sold for five hundred guineas at the auction. 這只古董花瓶在拍賣會上以五百幾尼的價格成交。
Guinea was a currency used in Britain before decimalization. 幾尼是英國在實行十進制前使用的貨幣。

meaning: 具有誤導性的外觀；一個罩子，一件斗篷。
sentences: Under the guise of patriotism 打著愛國主義的幌子
The term guise refers to a misleading appearance; a cover, a cloak. 偽裝一詞指的是具有誤導性的外觀；蓋，斗篷。
My brother is a talented musician who plays the guitar and piano. 我哥哥是一位有才華的音樂家，會彈吉他和鋼琴。
She is learning how to play the guitar through online tutorials. 她正在透過線上教學學習如何彈吉他。
The term guitarist refers to someone who plays a guitar. 吉他手一詞是指彈吉他的人。
The lesson introduced guitarist as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了吉他手這個術語，這是一個需要理解的有用術語。
The city is located on the beautiful coast of the Persian Gulf. 這座城市位於波斯灣美麗的海岸上。
There is a significant income gulf between the rich and the poor. 貧富之間存在著顯著的收入鴻溝（海灣，指差距）。

meaning: 容易受騙或受騙；天真，容易被欺騙或愚弄。
sentences: Andrew is so gullible, the way he still believes in Santa Claus, the Easter Bunny, the Tooth Fairy, and the Sandman at the age of fourteen. 安德魯太容易受騙了，他在十四歲的時候仍然相信聖誕老人、復活節兔子、牙齒仙子和睡魔。
The report describes the result as gullible. 報告稱這一結果是容易受騙的。

meaning: 守備位置位於方陣後方約 30 度的偏側，位於卡位和點之間；處於此位置的外野手。
sentences: The term gully refers to a fielding position on the off side about 30 degrees behind square, between the slips and point; a fielder in such a position. 術語「溝壑」是指在方陣後方約 30 度的邊線防守位置，位於卡瓦和點之間；處於這種位置的外野手。
The lesson introduced gully as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了溝壑作為一個易於理解的有用術語。
It is considered impolite to chew gum during an interview. 在面試中嚼口香糖被認為是不禮貌的。
